features: ALWAYS SHAKE WELL BEFORE SPRAYING FOR BEST RESULTS

Indoor or outdoor use. 100% natural, humane and long lasting. No chemicals, poisons or killers. Our active ingredients are Peppermint, Cinnamon, Chilli and Garlic essential oil. No harmful nasties and only completely natural ingredients. Safe for children and animals.
Concentrated solution. Just dilute with tap water. One 30ml bottle will give you a handy squirrel repellent for ages & ages.

Squirrels can cause problems in the garden, disturbing lawns, flowers, bulbs, fruit and vegetables. They can cause damage to tree bark, bird feeders, sheds, garages, cars and fences. Squirrels also disturb buildings by making access holes to access lofts, chimneys, etc. They also chew and bite through indoor and outdoor electric cables.

Indoor use spray fill a spray bottle with fresh water and apply six drops of oil to the water per 100ml. Shake well. Spray any areas and places where squirrels enter, dwell or disturb such as lofts and chimneys. Outdoor use fill a watering can or spray bottle with fresh water and apply nintey drops of oil to the water per one litre. Shake well. Water or spray all areas that you would like squirrels not to enter, dwell or disturb such as trees, fences, garages, bird tables, lawns and beds, etc.
description: Product Description Highly Effective and Great Value For Money - Each Diluted Litre of Spray Costs Pence! Indoor Spray - shake oil bottle well. Fill a spray bottle with fresh water and apply six drops of oil to the water per 100ml. Shake well. Spray areas such as lofts, cellars, fireplaces, etc. Outdoor Use - shake oil bottle well. Fill a fine spray watering can or spray bottle with fresh water and apply ninety drops of oil to the water per one litre. Shake well. Water or spray all areas that you would like squirrels not to enter or use such as soil, plant beds, lawn areas, gates, fences, bushes, pipes, sheds, etc. Humane Deterrent That's Safe and Works! Simply The Best! Chemical and Poison Free Plant based Kind To The Environment Recyclable Packaging Natural With No Added Nasties! Humane - it's not a poison! Economical - one bottle can make up to 12 litres of spray Goes A Long Way! The key to using a repellent is constancy and perseverance... You won't need to be sparse and worry you'll run out of spray. Use as much as you need! Accurate Dropper Built Into Bottle Just Dilute With Tap Water Long Shelf Life Our Pledge - If you've really, really tried and can't see a difference, then we'll give you your purchase fee back Squirrel Repellent Frequently Asked Questions How long does it take to work? Trainers and repellents only work well with frequent use and by reapplying regularly. Our long-lasting concentrated formula has been designed specifically with this in mind. Can I use regular tap water to dilute oil for spraying? Yes, you can dilute our repellent oil with water straight from the tap. Unlike ‘ready-made’ repellents that only have the capacity provided by the bottle purchased, our product goes further and is far more economical. Our 30ml bottle will make up to 12 litres of spray. How much do I have to use? Our repellent is aroma based so you should use regularly to maintain the deterrent smell of our oil blend. For most uses following our usage and frequency instructions will provide a level of aroma to help in repelling squirrel. Is your product pet safe? Our product only contains a proprietary blend of garlic, peppermint, cinnamon and chilli. so it is not poison based. This is why we created our effective, but humane deterrent. Will I be allergic? Our product only contains a proprietary blend of garlic, peppermint, cinnamon and chilli., so if you are not allergic to any of these substances then you will not have an allergic reaction. Is it skin and food safe? Essential oils in their undiluted form should never be applied directly to the skin, however diluted essential oils (dilution by carrier oil, water, etc.) are safe to use on the skin or come into contact with food. Please always use our product after reading and following the usage instructions. Do not use if you are allergic to garlic, peppermint, cinnamon and chilli. Is your product tested on animals? Absolutely no cruelty or testing on animals has been used in the making of this and all our products. The only testing that has been done is completely humane testing to find the best blend of the essential oils used to be the most effective repellent. Naturally Brilliant! Squirrels can cause a great deal of damage to both the interior and exterior of your home. Squirrels damage usually comes from their chewing and gnawing. Squirrels can squeeze through a hole the size of a golf ball. Squirrels chew through soffits, fascia boards, siding, wood, metal, and shingles to gain access to your attic. Once inside your home, squirrels damage attics by chewing wires, ripping up insulation, and defecating in the attic. Squirrels can easily chew through cedar shingles and other natural materials. Squirrel chewed hole into attic. Squirrel gained access to chimney. Squirrel chewing is not limited to natural materials. They will chew on aluminium. Squirrel chew marks on a metal gutter. Squirrel chew marks are on aluminium siding. A squirrel problem goes beyond chewing. A squirrel's nest can weaken the structure of your home. A squirrel typically builds its nest with leaves, grass, moss, and shreds of bark. But once they're in the attic, they'll use materials like insulation. A large squirrel nest build with straw and torn up materials found in the attic.
